title: Different ways I smoke Weed - Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle quickly reviews the different methods he uses to consume cannabis: edibles (oil syringe in tea with avocado), a hash vaporizer pen, an oil vape pen, and occasionally a bong. He compares cost, potency, battery life, and lung impact of each method, noting he avoids flower because concentrates have higher THC content and are cheaper per dose.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: avoids it because concentrates have higher THC and are more cost-effective
best for getting very high but can be overwhelming; better value if smoking steadily
better for maintenance and tolerance cycling; easier to control the high
cheapest and most cost-effective way to stay high all the time
likes the form factor but frustrated by poor battery life and slow charging; recommends buying multiple
hash gives a stronger, spikier high; oil feels more like a resin high; hash makes him feel more impaired
